ques: Identify the top-10 trending travel destination for 2026 through a blog, how many of them are in Asian.
answer: 2 — Of the blog's top-10 trending 2026 destinations (Kyoto, Lisbon, Queenstown, Cartagena, Cape Town, Seoul, Dubrovnik, Oaxaca, Reykjavík, Banff), only Kyoto (Japan) and Seoul (South Korea) are in Asia.
